title: mixed union — atomic + large object members
description: string | number | ProductEvent | UserEvent — exercises the flat encoder atomic short-circuit alongside the merged-object envelope.
schema:
JsonEncoder(
  RT.union([
    RT.string(),
    RT.number(),
    RT.object({
      kind: RT.literal('product'),
      id: RT.string(),
      sku: RT.string(),
      price: RT.number(),
      available: RT.boolean(),
      releasedAt: RT.date(),
      stock: RT.number(),
    }),
    RT.object({
      kind: RT.literal('user'),
      id: RT.string(),
      username: RT.string(),
      email: RT.string(),
      signedUpAt: RT.date(),
      loginCount: RT.number(),
      isPremium: RT.boolean(),
    }),
  ])
)
generated:
function YOw_dd5lFnP(v){return Number.isFinite(v)}

function YOw_s86WKqE(v){return typeof v === 'string'}
